title: Section 45ZM
content: 1[45ZM. Monetary Policy Report.--(1) The Bank shall, once in every six months, publish a document to be called the Monetary Policy Report, explaining-- (a) the sources of inflation; and (b) the forecasts of inflation for the period between six to eighteen months from the date of publication of the document. (2) The form and contents of the Monetary Policy Report shall be such as may be specified by the regulations made by the Central Board.]
